Hero.title: Organize your team, <gradient>accomplish more.</gradient>
Hero.description: TeamLine — The professional platform for managing projects, distributing tasks, and monitoring the team with ease.

Features.label: Features
Features.title: Everything your team needs to stay aligned
Features.description: Plan, assign, and track work in one clean bilingual workspace.

boards.title: Project Boards
boards.description: Organize every project into clear boards, stages, and task lists so your team always knows what comes next.

ownership.title: Task Ownership
ownership.description: Assign tasks, set priorities, and keep responsibilities visible across the whole team.

progress.title: Team Progress
progress.description: Track work status, completion progress, and recent activity without switching between tools.

bilingual.title: Bilingual Workspace
bilingual.description: Work comfortably in Arabic or English with layouts that feel natural in both directions.

HowItWorks.label: How it works
HowItWorks.title: Start organizing your team in minutes
HowItWorks.description: Create your team workspace, add projects, and turn work into clear tasks your team can follow.

team.title: Create your team
team.description: Set up a shared space for your members, projects, and daily workflow.

project.title: Add your projects
project.description: Break work into organized boards with stages that match your process.

tasks.title: Assign and track tasks
tasks.description: Give every task an owner, priority, and status so progress stays visible.

ProjectFlow.label: Project flow
ProjectFlow.title: See every task move from idea to done
ProjectFlow.description: Follow every project from idea to done with connected stages, task owners, and progress your team can understand at a glance.

UseCases.label: Use cases
UseCases.title: Built for teams that move work forward
UseCases.description: Whether you design, build, market, or study together, TeamLine keeps everyone aligned around clear tasks.

design.title: Product & design teams
design.description: Plan screens, assign design tasks, and review progress from idea to handoff.

software.title: Software teams
software.description: Organize features, bugs, reviews, and releases inside simple project boards.

marketing.title: Marketing teams
marketing.description: Manage campaigns, content calendars, approvals, and launch tasks in one place.

students.title: Students & small teams
students.description: Split group work into clear tasks, deadlines, and responsibilities everyone can follow.

FinalCTA.label: Get started
FinalCTA.title: Ready to organize your team with TeamLine?
FinalCTA.description: Start planning projects, assigning tasks, and tracking progress in one clean bilingual workspace.

Login.title: Login
Login.description: Welcome back! Please Login to your account.

Signup.title: Create an Account
Signup.description: Get full access to TeamLine and start your journey with your team.

Validation.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters
Validation.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 2 characters
Validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
